questionText: Break down your total gross global Scope 1 emissions by business activity.
questionKo: 귀사의 글로벌 총 Scope 1 배출량을 사업활동(activity) 단위로 구분하여 입력하십시오.
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Reporting emissions by activity allows a more in-depth understanding of business risks related to future regulation and climate-related issues, and allows organizations to identify potential opportunities to reduce emissions associated with operational activities.

guidance.text:
Question dependencies
This question only appears if you select "By activity" in response to 7.17.
guidance.textKo: 문항 dependencies This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "By 활동" in response to 7.17.

guidance.text:
Activity (column 1) 
Using no more than 500 characters, state the activity you are disclosing Scope 1 emissions for.
For more details on which activities to report, see guidance to 7.17.
Scope 1 emissions (metric tons CO2e) (column 2) 
Report your organization's greenhouse gas emissions in CO2-equivalent for the activity stated in column 1.
Negative numbers are not allowed as organizations are to report gross, not net figures.
Emissions figures should be for the reporting year only (as defined by your answer to 1.4).
Note for organizations responding to high-impact sector requests 
If your company's primary CDP sector is one of the the following: AC, FB, PF, CE, CH, CO, EU, MM, OG, ST, TO, or TS the response to 7.17.3 is not required. Organizations responding to these sector requests are presented with additional questions on this topic (7.19; 7.18, 7.42 7.42.1, 7.15.2, 7.15.3, 7.15.4) relating specifically to activities in the sector. Your primary CDP sector is displayed in your response dashboard.
guidance.textKo: 활동 (열 1) Using no more than 500 characters, state the 활동 you are disclosing Scope 1 배출량 for. For more details on which activities to report, see guidance to 7.17. Scope 1 배출량 (미터톤 CO2e) (열 2) Report 귀사의 온실가스 배출량 in CO2-equivalent 에 대한 활동 stated in 열 1. Negative numbers are not allowed as organizations are to report gross, not net figures. Emissions figures 해야 합니다 be 에 대한 보고연도 only (as defined by your answer to 1.4). Note for organizations responding to high-impact sector requests 만약 your company's primary CDP sector is one 의 the following: AC, FB, PF, CE, CH, CO, EU, MM, OG, ST, TO, 또는 TS the response to 7.17.3 is not required. Organizations responding to these sector requests are presented with additional questions on this topic (7.19; 7.18, 7.42 7.42.1, 7.15.2, 7.15.3, 7.15.4) relating specifically to activities in the sector. Your primary CDP sector is displayed in your response dash이사회.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성 행 in proportion to the number of 행 공개. 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 4/4점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
ROUTE A)
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Sum of figures provided in column 'Scope 1 emissions…' is NOT equal to the figure provided in column 'Gross global Scope 1 emissions…' in row 'Reporting year' in question 7.6 (± 5%) - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: Awareness 점수를 획득하려면 Disclosure에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. 경로 A) Sum of figures 입력 in 열 'Scope 1 배출량…' is equal to the figure 입력 in 열 '전 세계 총 Scope 1 배출량…' in 행 '보고연도' in 문항 7.6 (± 5%) - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) Sum of figures 입력 in 열 'Scope 1 배출량…' is NOT equal to the figure 입력 in 열 '전 세계 총 Scope 1 배출량…' in 행 '보고연도' in 문항 7.6 (± 5%) - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/3점입니다.

change.question_ko: 사업 활동별로 총 글로벌 Scope 1 배출량을 세분화하십시오 . ` M7. Environmental Performance - Climate Change 사업 활동 Scope 1 배출량 (CO2e 미터톤 ) 사업 부문별을 최대 500 자로 작성 숫자 입력 소수점 최대 3 자리 입력
change.q2025_text: Break down your total gross global Scope 1 emissions by business activity.
change.daml_summary: General: D 4/4 | A 0 or 1/1 or 3 | M 0/0 | L 0/0

sectorTagsKo: 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: Reporting emissions by activity allows a more in-depth understanding of business risks related to future regulation 및 기후 관련 이슈, 및 allows organizations to identify potential opportunities to reduce emissions associated with operational activities.
